findings.title: ReasonAlloc — Hierarchical KV Cache Allocation
findings.reason: KV cache memory optimization (60% reduction) compatible with vLLM/TensorRT-LLM. Essential for reasoning models with long chains-of-thought. New skill created.

findings.title: EEVEE — Test-Time Prompt Learning for Self-Improving Agents
findings.reason: Test-time prompt learning paradigm. Agents learn to adjust prompts during execution. Directly applicable to Hermes multi-agent systems. New skill created.

findings.title: PROJECTMEM — Local Event-Sourced Memory for Coding Agents
findings.reason: Local-first event-sourced memory architecture. Each agent action becomes immutable event. No external API dependency. Valuable design pattern for Hermes memory. New skill created.

findings.title: NVIDIA NemoClaw — Secure Coding Agents with Sandboxing
findings.reason: NVIDIA platform for autonomous coding agents with sandboxing, human approval policies, audit logging. Framework for enterprise-grade agent safety. New skill created.

findings.title: Maxproof — Formal Verification Framework for AI Systems
findings.reason: Formal verification framework based on maximum likelihood logic. Theoretical guarantees for critical system correctness. Watch for production adoption. New skill created.

findings.title: Agents' Last Exam — UC Berkeley Agent Benchmark
findings.reason: UC Berkeley benchmark for real-world agent capabilities (programming, research, web nav, tools). More relevant than traditional Q&A benchmarks for evaluating Hermes. New skill created.

findings.title: NVIDIA Confidential Computing — TEE Secure Inference
findings.reason: TEE-based secure inference. Data encrypted during processing. Used by Apple Private Cloud Compute. Potential EU AI Act requirement. Privacy routing for Hermes providers. New skill created.

findings.title: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server — 2-5x Throughput Improvement
findings.reason: Production-grade inference server. Dynamic batching, model ensembles, concurrent execution. 2-5x throughput without hardware change. Cost-per-token optimization for Hermes. New skill created.

findings.title: DiffusionGemma — Google Parallel Text Generation
findings.reason: Already has skill (diffusiongemma under mlops). Confirmed.

findings.title: OpenCV 5 — Computer Vision Leap
findings.reason: Already has skill (opencv-5 under mlops). Confirmed.

open-notebook — Open-Source NotebookLM
